Supplementary Materials:
Domain-Specific Gender Gaps in Sexual Attitudes

[Blinded for Review]

S1. Variable Coding and Measurement
S1. 变量编码和测量

S1.1 Dependent Variables
S1.1 因变量

Sexual attitude items are drawn from the CGSS morality module, which asks respondents to evaluate specific sexual behaviors on a scale from 1 (“always wrong”) to 5 (“not wrong at all”):
性态度条目取自 CGSS 道德模块，该模块要求受访者对特定的性行为进行评价，评分范围从 1（“总是错误的”）到 5（“完全没有错”）：

  • Premarital sex: “What is your opinion about sexual relations before marriage?” (a38)
    婚前性行为：“您对婚前性关系有何看法？”（a38）

  • Extramarital sex: “What is your opinion about a married person having sexual relations with someone other than his or her spouse?” (a39)
    婚外性行为：“你如何看待已婚人士与配偶以外的人发生性关系？”（a39）

  • Same-sex relations: “What is your opinion about sexual relations between two adults of the same sex?” (a40)
    同性关系：“您对两名成年同性之间的性关系有何看法？”（a40）

Higher values indicate more accepting attitudes.
数值越高表示接受度越高。

S1.2 Gender Ideology Index
S1.2 性别意识形态指数

The gender ideology index is constructed from five items (a421–a425), each rated on a 1–5 agree-disagree scale:
性别意识形态指数由五个项目（a421-a425）构成，每个项目均采用 1-5 的同意-不同意量表进行评分：

  1. “Men should focus on career, women should focus on family” (a421)
    “男人应该专注于事业，女人应该专注于家庭”（a421）

  2. “Men are inherently more capable than women” (a422)
    “男性天生比女性更有能力”（a422）

  3. “For women, marrying well is more important than doing well at work” (a423)
    “对女性而言，嫁个好人家比在工作中取得成功更重要”（a423）

  4. “When jobs are scarce, women should be fired first” (a424)
    “当工作岗位稀缺时，应该首先解雇女性”（a424）

  5. “Housework is primarily women’s responsibility” (a425)
    “家务主要是女性的责任”（a425）

The index is the mean of all available items (Cronbach’s α\alphaα = 0.72). Higher values indicate more patriarchal gender ideology. For regression models, the index is standardized (zzz-scored).
该指数是所有可用项目的平均值（克朗巴赫系数 α\alphaα = 0.72）。数值越高，表明父权制性别意识形态越强。对于回归模型，该指数已标准化（以 zzz 为分值）。

S1.3 Control Variables  S1.3 控制变量

  • Age: Continuous  年龄：连续

  • Age2^22/100: Quadratic age term divided by 100 for scaling
    年龄 2^22 /100：二次年龄项除以 100 以进行缩放。

  • Education: Years of formal schooling (continuous)
    教育程度：正规教育年限（连续）

  • Married: Binary (1 = currently married or cohabiting)
    婚姻状况：二元（1 = 目前已婚或同居）

  • CCP membership: Binary (1 = member of the Chinese Communist Party)
    中共党员身份：二元（1 = 中国共产党党员）

  • Religious: Binary (1 = identifies with any religion)
    宗教信仰：二元（1 = 认同任何宗教）

  • Internet user: Binary (1 = uses the Internet)
    互联网用户：二进制（1 = 使用互联网）

  • Urban: Binary (1 = urban residence)
    城市：二元（1 = 城市居住）

  • Agricultural hukou: Binary (1 = agricultural household registration)
    农业户口：二进制（1 = 农业户籍）

  • Ln(income): Natural log of annual personal income
    Ln(收入): 年度个人收入的自然对数

  • Survey year: Fixed effects (factor)
    调查年份：固定效应（因子）

S1.4 Missing Data  S1.4 缺失数据

Missing values were imputed using the missRanger algorithm with predictive mean matching (k=5k = 5k=5). This method combines random forest imputation with nearest-neighbor matching to preserve the distributional properties of the original data. All variables in the analytic dataset were included in the imputation model.
缺失值采用 missRanger 算法结合预测均值匹配( k=5k = 5k=5 )进行插补。该方法结合了随机森林插补和最近邻匹配，以保留原始数据的分布特性。分析数据集中的所有变量均包含在插补模型中。

S2. Heterogeneity Analysis: Full Estimates
S2. 异质性分析：完整估计

Table [tab:heterogeneity] reports the full coefficient estimates for all Female ×\times× Moderator interactions presented graphically in the main text. Panel A contains individual-level moderators; Panel B contains provincial development indicators. All coefficients within each column come from a single OLS model that includes all interactions simultaneously. Joint FFF-tests for all nine interactions are significant in each domain (p<.001p < .001p<.001).
表[tab:heterogeneity]报告了所有女性 ×\times× 调节变量交互作用的完整系数估计值，这些交互作用在正文中以图表形式呈现。A 部分包含个体层面的调节变量；B 部分包含省级发展指标。每列中的所有系数均来自一个同时包含所有交互作用的 OLS 模型。所有九个交互作用的联合 FFF 检验在每个领域均显著( p<.001p < .001p<.001 )。

S3. Cohort Heterogeneity: Full Estimates
S3.队列异质性：完整估计

Table [tab:cohort_het] reports the Female ×\times× Cohort interaction coefficients presented graphically in the main text.
表 [tab:cohort_het] 报告了正文中以图形方式呈现的女性 ×\times× 队列交互系数。

S4. Additional Figures  S4. 补充数据

S5. Robustness and Sensitivity Analyses
S5. 稳健性和敏感性分析

This section consolidates all robustness checks and sensitivity analyses. We assess the stability of the main findings across alternative model specifications (ordered logistic regression, province fixed effects), alternative estimation strategies (propensity score matching, inverse probability weighting, listwise deletion), supplementary tests (gender ideology interaction, wave-specific estimates), and formal sensitivity analyses (causal mediation sensitivity, E-values).
本节汇总了所有稳健性检验和敏感性分析。我们评估了主要研究结果在不同模型设定（有序逻辑回归、省份固定效应）、不同估计策略（倾向得分匹配、逆概率加权、列表删除）、补充检验（性别意识形态交互作用、特定波次估计）和正式敏感性分析（因果中介敏感性、E 值）下的稳定性。

S5.1 Ordered Logistic Regression
S5.1 有序逻辑回归

To verify that results are robust to the ordinal nature of the dependent variables, we re-estimated all main models using ordered logistic regression (proportional odds model).
为了验证结果对因变量的有序性质是否稳健，我们使用有序逻辑回归（比例优势模型）重新估计了所有主要模型。

S5.2 Province Fixed Effects
S5.2 省固定效应

To address concerns about unobserved provincial heterogeneity, we re-estimated main models with province fixed effects.
为了解决对未观察到的省级异质性的担忧，我们重新估计了具有省级固定效应的主要模型。

S5.3 Gender Ideology ×\times× Gender Interaction
S5.3 性别意识形态 ×\times× 性别互动

To formally test whether gender ideology operates differently for men and women, we estimated models with a female ×\times× gender ideology interaction term.
为了正式检验性别意识形态对男性和女性的影响是否不同，我们估计了包含女性 ×\times× 性别意识形态交互项的模型。

S5.4 Wave-Specific Estimates
S5.4 波段特定估计

To assess the stability of key coefficients across survey waves, we estimated the main model specification separately for each CGSS wave (2012–2023). Figure 3 plots the female coefficient and gender ideology coefficient by wave.
为了评估关键系数在不同调查轮次间的稳定性，我们分别针对每次 CGSS 调查（2012-2023 年）估计了主要模型设定。图 3 绘制了各轮次的女性系数和性别意识形态系数。

S5.5 Causal Mediation Sensitivity Analysis
S5.5 因果中介敏感性分析

Following Imai et al. (2010), we conducted sensitivity analysis for the causal mediation estimates using the medsens() function from the mediation R package. The sensitivity parameter ρ~\tilde{\rho}ρ~​ represents the correlation between the residuals of the mediator and outcome models. We report the value of ρ~\tilde{\rho}ρ~​ at which the ACME equals zero: ρ~=−0.010\tilde{\rho} = -0.010ρ~​=−0.010 for premarital sex, ρ~=0.050\tilde{\rho} = 0.050ρ~​=0.050 for extramarital sex, and ρ~=−0.050\tilde{\rho} = -0.050ρ~​=−0.050 for same-sex relations. These values are small, indicating that the mediation estimates are sensitive to unmeasured confounding: a confounder inducing a residual correlation of approximately 0.05 would suffice to nullify the extramarital and same-sex mediation effects.
参照 Imai 等人 (2010) 的方法，我们使用 R 语言包 mediation 中的 medsens() 函数对因果中介效应估计值进行了敏感性分析。敏感性参数 ρ~\tilde{\rho}ρ~​ 代表中介模型和结果模型残差之间的相关性。我们报告了 ACME 等于零时的 ρ~\tilde{\rho}ρ~​ 值： ρ~=−0.010\tilde{\rho} = -0.010ρ~​=−0.010 代表婚前性行为， ρ~=0.050\tilde{\rho} = 0.050ρ~​=0.050 代表婚外性行为， ρ~=−0.050\tilde{\rho} = -0.050ρ~​=−0.050 代表同性关系。这些值都很小，表明中介效应估计值对未测量的混杂因素很敏感：一个导致残差相关性约为 0.05 的混杂因素就足以抵消婚外情和同性关系的中介效应。

S5.6 E-Value Sensitivity Analysis
S5.6 E 值敏感性分析

Following VanderWeele and Ding (2017), we calculated E-values for the female coefficients in each domain. The E-value for the premarital sex coefficient is 1.48 (CI limit: 1.45), for extramarital sex 1.56 (CI limit: 1.52), and for same-sex relations 1.39 (CI limit: 1.35). These moderate thresholds suggest that unmeasured confounding alone is unlikely to fully explain the observed gender gaps, though they indicate that the same-sex domain is somewhat more vulnerable to confounding explanations.
参照 VanderWeele 和 Ding (2017) 的方法，我们计算了各领域女性系数的 E 值。婚前性行为系数的 E 值为 1.48（置信区间：1.45），婚外性行为系数的 E 值为 1.56（置信区间：1.52），同性关系系数的 E 值为 1.39（置信区间：1.35）。这些适中的阈值表明，仅凭未测量的混杂因素不太可能完全解释观察到的性别差异，但它们也表明，同性关系领域更容易受到混杂因素的影响。

S5.7 Summary of All Robustness Specifications
S5.7 所有稳健性规范的汇总

Table S7 summarizes the female coefficient across all robustness specifications. The direction, magnitude, and statistical significance of the gender gap in each domain are consistent across ordered logistic regression, province fixed effects, propensity score matching (1:1 nearest-neighbor with caliper 0.2, NNN = 65,350), inverse probability weighting (stabilized, trimmed at 99th percentile), and listwise deletion without imputation. E-values and sensitivity parameters from mediation analysis are also reported. We note that because gender is not a manipulable treatment, the PSM and IPW analyses should be interpreted as sensitivity checks for covariate imbalance rather than as causal treatment effect estimates.
表 S7 总结了所有稳健性检验模型中女性系数的汇总。在有序逻辑回归、省份固定效应、倾向得分匹配（1:1 最近邻匹配，卡尺值为 0.2， NNN = 65,350）、逆概率加权（稳定化，截尾于第 99 百分位数）以及不进行插补的列表删除法中，各领域性别差距的方向、大小和统计显著性均保持一致。此外，还报告了中介分析的 E 值和敏感性参数。需要注意的是，由于性别并非可操纵的处理变量，因此倾向得分匹配（PSM）和逆概率加权（IPW）分析应被解释为对协变量不平衡的敏感性检验，而非因果处理效应的估计。

Imai, Kosuke, Luke Keele, and Teppei Yamamoto. 2010. “Identification, Inference and Sensitivity Analysis for Causal Mediation Effects.” Statistical Science 25 (1): 51–71. https://doi.org/10.1214/10-STS321.
Imai, Kosuke, Luke Keele 和 Teppei Yamamoto. 2010. “因果中介效应的识别、推断和敏感性分析。” 统计科学 25 (1): 51–71。https://doi.org/10.1214/10-STS321。
VanderWeele, Tyler J., and Peng Ding. 2017. “Sensitivity Analysis in Observational Research: Introducing the E-Value.” Annals of Internal Medicine 167 (4): 268–74. https://doi.org/10.7326/M16-2607.
VanderWeele, Tyler J. 和 Peng Ding. 2017. “观察性研究中的敏感性分析：引入 E 值。”《内科年鉴》167 (4): 268–74。https://doi.org/10.7326/M16-2607。
